VENDOR JS — download these two files into this folder (self-hosted
so visitors never touch a third-party CDN):

  https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/gsap.min.js
  https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.5/ScrollTrigger.min.js

Keep the file names gsap.min.js and ScrollTrigger.min.js.
